title: Tamper-resistant container with lid
abstract: A tamper-resistant container with lid includes a container and a lid that interlock based on fitting the lid on the container. The container includes a side wall integrated with a bottom wall, a gutter formed along the edge of the side wall and an array of first protruding members formed on the side wall and protruding into a gutter volume. The lid includes a lid surface and lid rim with spaced inner and outer walls joined together at one end and non-joined at an opposite end, for receiving the edge of the side wall of the container. The lid rim additional includes at least one second protruding member formed on the outer wall of the lid and protruding into a space between spaced inner and outer walls configured to interlock with the array of first protruding members based on fitting the lid on the container.
claims: Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A tamper-resistant container with lid comprising: a container comprising: at least one side wall integrated with a bottom wall, together defining a cavity with an open top, wherein the open top is defined by an edge of the at least one side wall; a gutter formed on the at least one side wall along the edge of the at least one side wall, the gutter defining a gutter volume; and an array of first protruding members formed on the at least one side wall and protruding into the gutter volume; a lid comprising: a lid surface configured to cover the open top; a lid rim encompassing the lid surface defined by spaced inner and outer walls, joined together at one end and non-joined at an opposite end, for receiving the edge of the at least one side wall of the container between the spaced inner and outer walls; at least one second protruding member formed on the outer wall of the lid and protruding into a space between spaced inner and outer walls; wherein the array of first protruding members is configured to interlock with the at least one second protruding member based on fitting the lid on the container. 2. The tamper-resistant container with lid of claim 1, wherein the array of first protruding members extend from the at least one side wall into the gutter volume and are sloped toward the bottom wall. 3. The tamper-resistant container with lid of claim 1 or claim 2, wherein the at least one second protruding member is positioned on the outer wall at a defined height to fit below a first protruding element from the array when the container is closed with the lid. 4. The tamper-resistant container with lid of any one of claims 1-3, wherein the at least one second protruding member is shaped to slope toward the lid surface as it extends from the outer wall of the lid. 5. The tamper-resistant container with lid of any one of claims 1-4, wherein the at least one second protruding member is an array of second protruding members positioned along the outer wall to match positioning of at least a portion of the array of the first protruding members. 6. The tamper-resistant container with lid of any one of claims 1-4, wherein the at least one second protruding member is a rib extending surrounding the outer wall. 7. The tamper-resistant container with lid of any one of claims 1-6, wherein the gutter is defined by a gutter side wall and a gutter bottom wall and wherein the bottom wall is formed with an array of slits that are positioned to face the array of first protruding members. 8. The tamper-resistant container with lid of any one of claims 1-7, wherein the lid rim is formed with at least one hole at the joining between the inner and outer wall an at a position along the lid rim that faces the at least one second protruding member. 9. The tamper-resistant container with lid of any one of claims 1-8, wherein the array of first protruding members includes at least one first protruding member that is of a different size or shape. 10. The tamper-resistant container with lid of any one of claims 1-9, wherein the inner wall of the lid is configured to bend the at least one side wall when fitted on the container. 11. The tamper-resistant container with lid of any one of claims 1-10, comprising an array of wedges extending from the side wall from below the gutter and to gutter, wherein the array of wedges is configured to provide structure support against bending of the gutter. 12. The tamper-resistant container with lid of any one of claims 1-11, wherein the gutter is defined by a gutter side wall and a gutter bottom wall and wherein the gutter side wall is angled toward the at least one side wall of the container. 13. The tamper-resistant container with lid of any one of claims 1-12, wherein the gutter is defined by a gutter side wall and a gutter bottom wall and wherein the gutter is formed with an array of wings protruding from the gutter side wall toward the gutter volume. 14. The tamper-resistant container with lid of any one of claims 1-12, wherein the gutter is defined by a gutter side wall and a gutter bottom wall and wherein the gutter side walls includes an array of protruding members formed on the gutter side walls and protruding into the gutter volume. 15. The tamper-resistant container with lid of any one of claims 1-14, wherein a portion of the gutter includes perforations, said portion configured to be removed when opening the container. 16. A tamper-resistant container comprising: at least one side wall integrated with a bottom wall, together defining a cavity with an open top, wherein the open top is defined by an edge of the at least one side wall; a gutter formed on the at least one side wall along the edge of the at least one side wall, the gutter defining a gutter volume and defined by a gutter side wall and a gutter bottom wall; an array of protruding members formed on the at least one wall and protruding into the gutter volume; and wherein the gutter is formed with an array of slits that are positioned to face the array of protruding members. 17. The tamper-resistant container of claim 16, wherein the gutter side wall is angled toward the at least one side wall. 18. The tamper-resistant container of claim 16 or claim 17, wherein the gutter is formed with an array of wings protruding from the gutter side wall toward the gutter volume. 19. The tamper-resistant container of any one of claims 16-18, comprising an array of wedges extending from the side wall from below the gutter and to gutter, wherein the array of wedges is configured to provide structure support against bending of the gutter. 20. The tamper-resistant container of any one of claims 16-18, wherein a portion of the gutter includes perforations, said portion configured to be removed when opening the container. 21. A lid for a tamper-resistant container, the lid comprising: a lid surface configured to cover the container; a lid rim encompassing the lid surface and defined by spaced inner and outer walls, joined together at one end and non-joined at an opposite end; an array of protruding member formed on the outer wall of the lid and protruding into a space between spaced inner and outer walls; and an array of slits on the rim positioned to face the array of protruding members.
